concepts.title: Helm Chart Values
concepts.description: Configuration via Helm values. No API key. Includes image, resources, logLevel, statusUpdateIntervalSeconds, argocd config, Prometheus/ArgoCD endpoint overrides, metrics intervals, event retention.

concepts.title: Well-Architected Framework Assessment
concepts.description: Check registry, runner, database schema, CLI (assess run/list/get/summary/history), Prometheus metrics. Pillars: security, reliability, performance, cost, operational excellence, sustainability.

concepts.title: Trivy Image Vulnerability Scanning
concepts.description: Container image scanning via Trivy for security pillar (M3).

concepts.title: Status ConfigMap
concepts.description: kube9-operator-status ConfigMap with mode, tier, version, health, lastUpdate, namespace. No registered, clusterId.

concepts.title: SQLite Storage
concepts.description: better-sqlite3 at /data/kube9.db. Tables: assessments, assessment_history, events. argocd_apps and collections planned for M8/M9.

concepts.title: CLI Query Interface
concepts.description: kubectl exec for query status, query events list/get, assess run/list/get/summary/history.

concepts.title: ArgoCD Configuration
concepts.description: M1: Endpoint override, namespace override. M9: Application sync/health status, drift detection.

concepts.title: Prometheus Configuration
concepts.description: M1: Endpoint override for metrics scraping.
